description: We are seeking a storyteller who can turn dense technical topics into cinematic experiences. You will lead editing on our YouTube channel, course trailers, and documentary releases.

description: Design hands-on programming bootcamps and systems design catalogs. You'll draft curriculum blueprints, verify coding exercises, and create automated testing setups.

description: Moderate our 100k+ Discord community, coordinate student mentorship panels, and lead logistics for virtual/physical hackathons.
